description: Authoritative registry of all calc_version values. Every calc_version must be registered here with its logic description and introducing PR. Changes to calculation logic files without a registry update fail the calc-version-registry gate.

calc_versions.label: baseline
calc_versions.description: Initial calculation version. Deals store assumptions and outputs via deal_inputs and deal_outputs tables. No formula logic implemented server-side yet; calc_version tracks schema generation only.

calc_versions.label: 9.7 token lifetime invariant
calc_versions.description: 9.7: create_share_token_v1 recreated with 90-day maximum lifetime guard. Migration references calc_version incidentally via deals join — no calc logic changed.

calc_versions.label: 9.5 token cardinality guard
calc_versions.description: 9.5: create_share_token_v1 recreated with cardinality guard. Migration references calc_version incidentally via deals join in lookup path — no calc logic changed.

calc_versions.label: 9.4 token format validation
calc_versions.description: 9.4: lookup_share_token_v1 recreated with format guard before hashing. Migration joins deals to return calc_version in success response — incidental token reference, no calc logic changed.

calc_versions.label: 8.4 hash-at-rest
calc_versions.description: 8.4: share token lookup RPC references calc_version in SELECT/return. No calc logic changed. Hash-at-rest conversion only.

calc_versions.label: 10.8.5 TC data model - update_deal_v1 hardening
calc_versions.description: 10.8.5: update_deal_v1 recreated with immutable close guard. Migration references calc_version incidentally in UPDATE SET and COALESCE - no calc logic changed. Immutable close enforced by stage check only.

calc_versions.label: 10.8.4 deal health computation
calc_versions.description: 10.8.4: list_deals_v1 recreated with health_color field. Migration references calc_version incidentally in json_build_object return - no calc logic changed. Health computation derives from updated_at and stage only.

calc_versions.label: 10.8.11N expired write lock
calc_versions.note: Migration references calc_version only in update_deal_v1 retrofit (deal update return shape and optimistic concurrency). No calc protocol changed. Write lock enforcement only.
calc_versions.description: 10.8.11N: Migration references calc_version only in update_deal_v1 retrofit (deal update return shape and optimistic concurrency). No calc protocol changed. Write lock enforcement only. Incidental reference, no calc logic changed.

10.9: create_deal_v1 revised to compute MAO server-side from p_assumptions inputs (arv, repair_estimate, desired_profit, multiplier). calc_version=1 preserved as authoritative DB version. assumptions.calc_version='mao_v1' added as descriptive formula label inside jsonb blob. No new calc_version integer introduced -- MAO formula is the first real calc logic registered under version 1.

calc_versions.label: 10.11A stage normalization and acq RPCs
calc_versions.description: 10.11A: migrations 20260419000004 and 20260419000005 reference calc_version incidentally. Migration 4 corrects stage values in update_deal_v1; migration 5 reads calc_version in get_acq_deal_v1 for pricing payload. No calc logic changed.

calc_versions.label: 10.11A3 acq deal detail read corrections
calc_versions.description: 10.11A3: get_acq_deal_v1 pricing json still includes di.calc_version; adds mao and multiplier from assumptions snapshot only (same governed source as existing pricing fields). No new calc_version integer; no server-side MAO recompute or formula change.

calc_versions.label: 10.11A7 deal pricing write path
calc_versions.description: 10.11A7: update_deal_pricing_v1 inserts a new deal_inputs row copying calc_version from the latest base snapshot (v_base_row.calc_version). Merges numeric assumption keys only; no server-side MAO recompute; no new calc_version integer or formula protocol change.

calc_versions.label: 10.11A8 repair estimate source-of-truth cleanup
calc_versions.description: 10.11A8: update_deal_properties_v1 recreated — removes repair_estimate from allowed p_fields; repair estimate writes use update_deal_pricing_v1 / deal_inputs.assumptions only. Migration text references update_deal_pricing_v1 (pricing_ token match only). No deals/deal_inputs calc_version integer change; no MAO formula or merge math change.
